hero.headline: Al-Nahw Al-Kafi
hero.valueProposition: Structured audio lessons that take you from zero to mastering Arabic grammar (النحو).
hero.mockupAlt: Al-Nahw Al-Kafi app lesson screen on a smartphone

features.heading: Everything You Need to Master Grammar
features.subtitle: A complete toolkit designed to make Arabic grammar accessible and engaging.

audioLessons.title: Audio Lessons
audioLessons.description: Listen to expertly crafted grammar lessons with a clear voice and engaging style — anytime, anywhere.

structured.title: Structured Content
structured.description: A step-by-step learning path from grammar basics to advanced topics, without confusion or overwhelm.

quizzes.title: Interactive Quizzes
quizzes.description: Test your understanding after every lesson with interactive questions that reinforce retention.

examPrep.title: Thanaweya Amma Prep
examPrep.description: Content tailored for high school exam students, covering the full grammar curriculum required for the Thanaweya Amma exam.

irab.title: Worked Examples with إعراب
irab.description: Real examples from the Quran and Arabic literature with complete grammatical parsing (إعراب) for every word.

offline.title: Offline Access
offline.description: Download lessons and listen without an internet connection — learn on your own schedule.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps toward mastering Arabic grammar.

1.title: Pick a Lesson
1.description: Browse the learning path and choose a lesson suited to your level, from beginner to advanced.

2.title: Listen and Learn
2.description: Follow the clear audio explanation and detailed examples inside the app.

3.title: Test Yourself
3.description: Answer quiz questions after each lesson to measure your understanding and reinforce what you learned.

screenshots.heading: A Complete Learning Experience
screenshots.subtitle: A clean, focused interface that keeps you on what matters.

alts.lesson: ArabSyntax app lesson screen showing audio playback and Arabic text
alts.quiz: Interactive quiz screen in the ArabSyntax app
alts.examples: Worked examples screen with detailed إعراب in the ArabSyntax app

pricing.heading: Choose the Plan That Works for You
pricing.subtitle: Start free and upgrade when you are ready.
pricing.legacyNote: If you purchased the app before the subscription system launched, you keep all premium features permanently at no extra cost.

audiences.heading: Built for You
audiences.subtitle: Whether you are studying for exams or love the Arabic language, this app is for you.

students.heading: For Thanaweya Amma Students
students.description: Cover the full grammar curriculum in a simplified, engaging way. Practice the grammatical patterns and structures that appear in Thanaweya Amma exams and boost your grades with confidence.

learners.heading: For Arabic Language Learners
learners.description: Understand Classical Arabic grammar deeply, not just memorize it. Enjoy grammar through examples from the Holy Quran and authentic Arabic literature.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions.

freePaid.question: Is Al-Nahw Al-Kafi free?
freePaid.answer: Yes, free on both stores, no subscriptions, no IAP.

platforms.question: Which platforms is the app available on?
platforms.answer: The app is available on both Google Play and the App Store.

levels.question: Is it suitable for beginners?
levels.answer: Yes, the lessons are structured to take you from the very basics to advanced topics, making it suitable for learners at all levels.

exam.question: Does it cover Thanaweya Amma requirements?
exam.answer: Yes, the app covers the full grammar curriculum required for the Thanaweya Amma exam.

offline.question: Can I use the app offline?
offline.answer: Many lessons are available after a one-time download; an internet connection is needed for the first download and for updates.

ios.question: Is the app available on iPhone (iOS)?
ios.answer: Yes, Al-Nahw Al-Kafi is available on both Google Play (Android) and the App Store (iOS).

legacy.question: I bought the app before subscriptions launched — do I still have full access?
legacy.answer: Yes. If you purchased the app before the subscription system launched, you keep all premium features permanently at no extra cost.

update.question: How often is the app updated?
update.answer: We regularly add new lessons and improvements. All updates are free for active subscribers and lifetime purchasers.

support.question: How do I contact support?
support.answer: You can use the support form on our website or email us directly.

privacy.question: Does the app collect my personal information?
privacy.answer: We do not collect personal information directly. For details on what is shared with third-party services like crash reporting, please see our Privacy Policy.

finalCta.headline: Start Your Arabic Grammar Journey Today
finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of learners mastering grammar in a new way.

freeCallout.heading: Free to Download
freeCallout.subtitle: Start your Arabic grammar journey today. Available on Android and coming soon to iOS.

support.title: Support
support.description: Have a question or problem? Get in touch and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.

placeholders.name: Enter your name
placeholders.subject: What are you contacting us about?

errors.subjectMin: Subject must be at least 3 characters
errors.messageMin: Message must be at least 10 characters
errors.rateLimited: Too many messages sent. Please try again later.
errors.sendFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

success.heading: Message sent!
success.body: We have received your message and will respond within 48 hours.
